content.en:
One move to win or lose!

Ye Tian only used one move to crush Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor's physical body!

It's horrible!

However, in the fighting platform, there were also some half-step domain ancestors who could also defeat their opponents with one move, so Ye Tian's battle did not cause much repercussions.

There were only a few people who paid attention to Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor, and because Ye Tian defeated him with one move, they paid attention to Ye Tian's body.

After all.

Bai Yuan Daozu's strength is not bad!

In the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor's strength can also be ranked among the top!

In the Battle Realm Tower, Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor also challenged a lot of Ten Thousand Realm half-step domain ancestors on the Dou Zhan Tai, and successfully won the points of those Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors, which can also be seen how strong Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor is!

However!

It was such a strong Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor, and he was defeated by Ye Tian with one move!

After Bai Yuan Daozu's body was torn apart by the Heaven Slaying Spear, his body was soon reunited under the action of the Battle Realm Tower.

Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor, who had recondensed his physical body, still maintained a shocked expression on his face.

He didn't understand, why did a half-step domain ancestor from a small place have such a strong strength?

Even in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, there are not many half-step domain ancestors in the Ten Thousand Realm who can kill him in one move, all of them are geniuses who are famous in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain!

When he was selecting his opponents in the Fighting Arena, he deliberately avoided these powerful Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors.

This time, he happened to see that the opponent that the Battle Realm Tower matched him with was not these half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Things Realm that he needed to avoid, so he accepted Ye Tian's challenge.

On the contrary, when Ye Tian reported that it was from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, he secretly rejoiced that he could easily get points again.

But he didn't expect that Ye Tian would be able to kill him directly with one move!

And!

When he faced Ye Tian's attack, it was as if he was facing a top-level Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor!

Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor believed that his perception was not wrong!

So what the hell is going on?

Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor, who had re-condensed his body, glanced at Ye Tian with a complicated expression, and next, he had to observe Ye Tian's strength carefully!

For the complicated gaze of the loser on the fighting platform, Ye Tian directly ignored it.

However, although he defeated Bai Yuan Daozu with one move, he still recognized Bai Yuan Daozu's strength.

If Bai Yuan Daozu's opponent was not himself, he would not have lost so badly.

"Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor's strength, in terms of the ranking of the Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, except for me, can be called invincible, even the top Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors are not his opponents. "

Ye Tian said secretly.

And a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm with such strength as Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor can be said to have tens of thousands in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain!

This is the difference between the Void to the Ancient Realm and the Dark Forbidden Realm!

At the same time, Ye Tian was also a little more curious about the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain!

Subsequently, Ye Tian looked at his points and saw that his points had become 200, and he was very satisfied with this!

Next.

Ye Tian directly looked for an opponent in the challenge rewarded with 200 points, and directly asked the Battle Boundary Tower to match him with an opponent.

Anyway, for Ye Tian, as long as he was a half-step domain ancestor in the Ten Thousand Things Realm, he could easily defeat him!

As for who the opponent is, he doesn't need to pay special attention!

That is, the self-confidence of a strong person!

Subsequently, the Battle Realm Tower matched Ye Tian with an opponent, and the other party also accepted his challenge after checking Ye Tian's record!

However!

For this new opponent! Ye Tian is still effortless, and he will directly kill him in one move!

200 points in hand!

Now, after two games, Ye Tian has 400 points!

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to let the Battle Realm Tower match his opponents!

This time!

Ye Tian matched a challenge with a reward of 400 points!

This time, Ye Tian still killed the other party in seconds without much effort!

It can be said that in an instant, Ye Tian has 800 points!

Next, Ye Tian did not withdraw from the battle platform, but continued to let the Battle Tower match the opponent.

It's just a pity!

He originally wanted the Battle Realm Tower to directly match an opponent with 800 points as a reward, but unfortunately, at the half-step domain ancestor level of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, he didn't find an opponent who dared to challenge with so many points.

Up to 500 points will be awarded as a challenge!

on this.

Ye Tian said that it was a pity!

Next, the Battle Realm Tower continued to match Ye Tian with several opponents, most of which were challenges rewarded with 100 to 500 points.

For challenges with less than 100 points as a reward, Ye Tian directly ignored them.

The Battle Realm Tower matched Ye Tian with several opponents, no matter how strong the opponent was, they were all killed by Ye Tian in seconds!

After a few battles, Ye Tian gained 3700 points!

3700 points!

Although Ye Tian was not particularly satisfied with this number of points, he couldn't match the opponent for the time being, so Ye Tian chose to rest for a while.

3700 points, this number was deeply stimulated to Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor, who had been paying attention to Ye Tian.

"I didn't expect this half-step domain ancestor of the Xuanxuan to the Ancient Realm to be so strong, I won't be wronged if I lost in his hands. With his strength, even in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, he can rank in a good ranking. "

Bai Yuan Dao Ancestor said secretly.

He rolled over a lot of battles in the arena before he won 1270 points.

And Ye Tian only won 3700 points after just a few fights!

That's the gap!

In this regard, Bai Yuan Daozu had to swallow his unwillingness!

Of course.

Ever since Ye Tian entered the Fighting Arena, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, the Jinchen Dao Ancestor, the Eternal Dao Ancestor, and the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord and others had been paying close attention to his battle!

After personally going down to the battle platform to fight those half-step domain ancestors in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, they also saw the strength of those half-step domain ancestors in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the strength of those half-step domain ancestors was also very strong! Anyway, they were not the opponents of those half-step domain ancestors at all.

Even if they knew that Ye Tian's strength was strong, they didn't expect that Ye Tian would win so easily when he fought with these people!

"In the past tens of millions of years, I thought that my strength had grown a lot, but I didn't expect that the strength of the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor was even more terrifying to the extreme, compared to the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, I am still too weak now, and he is afraid that there will be a trick that will hit my strength hard. "

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord sighed with emotion.

"It seems that we must not easily provoke him in the future, otherwise when he steps into the Unified Realm, the Great Array of the Heavenly Emperor Palace will not be able to protect us. "

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master also spoke.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master nodded, fully agreeing with the words of the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master.
